title: mammillaria eriacantha subsp. eriacantha
intro: Mammillaria eriacantha subsp. eriacantha, also known as the Pincushion Cactus, is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential candidate for the treatment of infections and wounds. The health benefits of Mammillaria eriacantha subsp. eriacantha include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and heart disease. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and grinding the stems, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications.
